question.label: Support needed
question.name: What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
question.description: Closes by turning the conversation toward immediate support and practical stabilizers.

answer: I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.

assessment.note: Deficiency-as-request: he says steadiness would require real authority to own bigger direction, signalling missing role clarity and support.

new_queue.label: Priority ranking
new_queue.name: If you had to cut your work in half tomorrow, what would you drop first — and what's non-negotiable?

issues: ref_alias q_support_needed_15 not in remaining queue — treating as new

history.answer_excerpt: I have been less present in rituals, yes.
I can own bigger direction, but I need real authority to do it.

I stayed focused on delivery because that felt controllable.
I am not sure the work I am doing is the work that gets recognized.
